# Requesting a Price Match

To request a price match, customers must submit a link to the competitor's listing within fourteen days of their purchase. If approved, the price match will refund the difference to the original payment method. To prevent reselling, each customer is restricted to three approved price matches within a thirty-day period.

[Source: price_matching.md#requesting-a-price-match]
